titleStmt.title: SII 6.725: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 725. (A.R. No. 253-F of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . lakṣmīvān vīragaṁgakṣitipatitilakaḥ sa¨rvvalōkābhirā
maḥ prakhyātōrupratāpassurabhikulapayōrāśirākāsudhāṁ
śuḥ . Āśādhīśakṛpānāṁ rucikaḷitayaśaścaṁdrikassatkaḷāvān .
saṁgītajñō vadānyassamavatu dharaṇīṁ yāvadācaṁdratāraṁ . 1
śākābdē vyōmaratnāruṇaparigaṇitē māghamāsē sitāyāṁ paṁcamyā
ṁ bhānuvārē hariśikharipatēssannidhau puṇyasiddhyai . dīpaṁ prādādakhaṁ
ḍaṁ viyadiṣugaṇitānaicikīstasya sidhyai sōyaṁ rājāvataṁsassaka
ḷaguṇanidhiḥ putrikāṁ kupyarūpāṁ . śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1290
yagunēṁṭi māgha bahaḷa paṁcamiyu ravivāramunāṁḍu gā
tsyamadagōtrajuṁḍaina surabhikulajāta jaṁtaṟunāṁṭi pratāpavī
ragaṁgarāju tanaku nabhīṣṭā¨rtthasiddhigānu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuni sanni
dhini nityamunnu Oka Akhaṁḍadīpamu veluṁguṭaku beṭṭina mō
dālu Eṁbhai 50 Ī dīpapratima O 1 . kaiḷyaṁpūṁḍiyaṁdu jala
kṣētramu Alaṁpaku puṭṭeṁḍu kṣētamu caṁdṛkhillārikiṁ peṭṭenu
Ītaṁḍu Ī dīpāna pasulaṁ gāci māsapaḍi neĪ tecci śrībhaṁḍāramu
nakuṁ beṭṭi bhōgyamusēyaṁgalāṁḍu Ī dha¨rmmamu Ācaṁdrākkasthā
yigāṁ jellaṁgaladu . śa truṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣi
bhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ sryāt dha¨rmmaśśatru¨rnna kasyacit . I dha¨rmmuvu
śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 6.725 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
